mapper.select: select T.TRACE_ID as traceId, coalesce(T.TRACE_NAME, '') as traceName, coalesce(T.TRACE_TYPE, '') as traceType, coalesce(T.TRACE_PATH, '') as tracePath, coalesce(T.TRACE_IP, '') as traceIp, coalesce(T.SYS_ID, '') as systemId, coalesce(S.SYS_TYPE, '') as systemType, coalesce(S.sys_name, '') as systemName, coalesce(T.USER_PARAM_FUNC, '') as userParamFunc, coalesce(T.TITLE_FUNC, '') as titleFunc, coalesce(T.LOG_TYPE, '') as logType, T.prv_info_func as privateInfoFunc from master.TN_TRACEINFO T join master.TN_SYSINFO S on T.SYS_ID = S.SYS_ID where T.delete_yn = 'N' ;
mapper.insert: insert into master.tn_traceinfo (trace_id, trace_name, trace_type, trace_path, trace_ip, sys_id, user_param_func, title_func, log_type, admin_id_create, admin_id_update, create_datetime, update_datetime, delete_yn, logging_yn, status, status_update_datetime, base_url) select #{newTrace.traceId}, #{newTrace.traceId}, trace_type, trace_path, trace_ip, #{newTrace.systemId}, user_param_func, title_func, log_type, 'WEEDS', 'WEEDS', now(), now(), delete_yn, logging_yn, status, status_update_datetime, base_url from master.tn_traceinfo where trace_id=#{parentTrace.traceId}
mapper.select: SELECT seq as seq, trace_id as traceId, sys_id as systemId, login_url as loginUrl, user_param_name as userParamName, user_param_func as userParamFunc FROM master.tn_trace_login_info order by seq asc;
